title: VirtualMachine
description: A CloudStack virtual machine resource with its configuration and runtime state.

name.description: Display name of the virtual machine.

state.description: Current state of the virtual machine.

zoneid.description: UUID of the zone containing the virtual machine.

zonename.description: Name of the zone containing the virtual machine.

serviceofferingid.description: UUID of the service offering used by the virtual machine.

templateid.description: UUID of the template used to create the virtual machine.

ipaddress.description: Primary IP address of the virtual machine.
